tasting_rooms.name: Wolfberger Cave Vinicole Eguisheim
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free self-guided cellar visit and tasting; group cellar tours by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1902, Alsace's oldest wine cooperative pours its Cremant, Grand Cru and eau-de-vie range in a cellar lined with 1902 foudres. Free tasting daily for individuals.

tasting_rooms.name: Famille Hugel Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: 3 Rue de la 1ere Armee, 68340 Riquewihr, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour and tasting by reservation; free for private customers, fee for groups
tasting_rooms.description: Twelve generations of Hugel since 1639 on the main street of Riquewihr, with cellar tours through the 17th-century barrel hall and tastings of the Classic, Estate and Grossi Laue ranges.

verified.address_quoted: 3, rue de la premiere Armee, 68340 Riquewihr

tasting_rooms.name: Maison Trimbach Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free tasting by appointment for private customers; tasting fee for groups
tasting_rooms.description: Thirteenth-generation Maison Trimbach since 1626, tasting cellar in Ribeauville with old foudres and stainless vats. Home of Clos Sainte Hune and Cuvee Frederic Emile Riesling.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaines Schlumberger Caveau
tasting_rooms.pricing: Discovery visit EUR 15, Prestige visit EUR 25, Adventure visit EUR 50; Wine and Cheese pairing EUR 25 Saturdays
tasting_rooms.description: Single-ownership Guebwiller estate at 130 hectares with four Grand Cru sites: Kitterle, Kessler, Saering and Spiegel. Caveau tours run Tuesday to Saturday with tastings of the four Grand Cru cuvees.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Weinbach
tasting_rooms.address: 25 Route du Vin, 68240 Kaysersberg Vignoble, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting by appointment only at the Clos des Capucins estate
tasting_rooms.description: Faller family Demeter and Ecocert estate at the foot of the Schlossberg Grand Cru, tasted inside the Clos des Capucins cellar. Catherine Faller and sons Eddy and Theo host visits.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Leon Beyer
tasting_rooms.address: 2 Rue de la Premiere Armee, 68420 Eguisheim, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting by appointment at the Eguisheim cellars
tasting_rooms.description: Beyer family since 1580 in Eguisheim, classic dry-style house with Comtes d'Eguisheim Riesling and Cuvee des Ecaillers. Tasting cellar with stone walls inside the medieval village.

verified.address_quoted: 2, rue de la premiere armee 68420 Eguisheim

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Marcel Deiss
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting EUR 15 per person, deducted from purchases over EUR 50; appointment recommended
tasting_rooms.description: Demeter biodynamic estate of Jean-Michel Deiss in Bergheim, famous for co-planted field blends and the Altenberg de Bergheim Grand Cru. Tasting boutique on the Route du Vin.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Zind-Humbrecht
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tasting by appointment only, often booked weeks ahead
tasting_rooms.description: Biodynamic estate of Olivier Humbrecht MW in the Herrenweg of Turckheim, tasting Brand, Rangen de Thann and Clos Saint-Urbain Grand Crus in a dedicated cellar.

tasting_rooms.name: Dopff au Moulin
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free tasting for private customers; guided tour by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Dopff family since 1574 at the foot of Grand Cru Schoenenbourg, the cellar that pioneered Cremant d'Alsace in 1900. Tour the foudre hall and taste the sparkling and still ranges.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison Pierre Sparr
tasting_rooms.pricing: Open daily 10:00 to 12:30 and 14:00 to 18:30; free tasting boutique
tasting_rooms.description: Sparr family negociant since 1680, tasting boutique in Beblenheim after the move from Sigolsheim. Range covers Reserve, Brand and Schoenenbourg single-vineyard Rieslings.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Paul Blanck
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free tasting for under 9 persons; EUR 20 per person for groups of 8 plus
tasting_rooms.description: Blanck family in Kientzheim since 1610, cellar pioneer of single-cru bottling. Open daily for boutique tastings of Furstentum, Mambourg, Schlossberg and Wineck Grand Cru Rieslings.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Albert Boxler
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tasting by appointment Monday to Friday 14:00 to 17:00
tasting_rooms.description: Single-street village domaine of Jean Boxler, cult source for Brand and Sommerberg Grand Cru Rieslings. Visits by appointment in a tasting room inside the family cellar.
